meaning: n.淡色,色调,些微气味,气息,风味vt.微染,使带气息
examples: There was a pink tinge to the sky.
There was a faint pink tinge to the sky.
His skin had an unhealthy greyish tinge.
He noticed that the color of the water in the toilet had an inexplicable bluish tinge.
It had a strange greenish tinge to it, with a definite tail behind it.
